action: S_I=-integral d^4x [D rho_I(n_I)+J_I^mu partial_mu ell_I], D=sqrt(-g), q=-g_mu_nu J_I^mu J_I^nu, n_I=sqrt(q)/D; rho_b=m_b n_b and rho_r=kappa_r n_r^(4/3).
variational_variables: Two independent off-shell directions (h^{mu nu},j^mu,lambda) and (k^{mu nu},r^mu,mu), with g^{mu nu}, contravariant density J^mu, and ell independent.
covariant_first_variation: delta q=J^T g h g J-2 J^T g j; delta D=-D tr_g(h)/2; delta n=n[delta q/(2q)+tr_g(h)/2]; delta L=-rho delta D-D rho' delta n-j^mu partial_mu ell-J^mu partial_mu lambda.
covariant_second_variation: delta2q=-J^T(gkghg+ghgkg)J+2J^Tghgr+2J^Tgkgj-2j^Tgr; delta2n=n[p_h p_k+delta2q/(2q)-deltaq_h deltaq_k/(2q^2)-h_g_k/2]; delta2L=-rho delta2D-rho'(deltaD_h delta n_k+deltaD_k delta n_h)-D rho'' delta n_h delta n_k-D rho' delta2n-j^mu partial_mu mu-r^mu partial_mu lambda.
scalar_flrw_convention: Conformal time: N=a(1+A), N_i=a^2 partial_i B, h_ij=a^2[(1-2psi)delta_ij+2 partial_i partial_j E]. Blocks reported here are the requested A,B,current,potential subblocks at psi=E=0.
scalar_current_decomposition: For each nonzero mode f(eta,x)=int d^3k/(2pi)^3 f_k(eta) exp(i k.x), reality f_-k=f_k*, J^0=Jbar^0+delta J^0 and J^i=i k^i delta J_L; quadratic expressions pair k with -k and k^2=delta^ij k_i k_j.

baryon_scalar_blocks.nonzero: H_A,J0=-a m_b; H_B,B=a m_b Jbar_b^0 k^2; H_B,JL=a m_b k^2; H_JL,JL=a m_b k^2/Jbar_b^0; H_J0,ell=-partial_eta and H_ell,J0=+partial_eta; H_JL,ell=-k^2, with algebraic symmetric partners.
baryon_scalar_blocks.exact_zero_blocks: AA, AB, A-JL, B-J0, J0-J0, J0-JL, A-ell, B-ell, ell-ell.

radiation_scalar_blocks.nonzero: H_A,J0=-(4/3) kappa_r (Jbar_r^0)^(1/3); H_B,B=(4/3) kappa_r (Jbar_r^0)^(4/3) k^2; H_B,JL=(4/3) kappa_r k^2 (Jbar_r^0)^(1/3); H_J0,J0=-(4/9) kappa_r (Jbar_r^0)^(-2/3); H_JL,JL=(4/3) kappa_r k^2 (Jbar_r^0)^(-2/3); H_J0,ell=-partial_eta and H_ell,J0=+partial_eta; H_JL,ell=-k^2, with algebraic symmetric partners.
radiation_scalar_blocks.exact_zero_blocks: AA, AB, A-JL, B-J0, J0-JL, A-ell, B-ell, ell-ell.

continuity_rows.origin: Variation of delta ell_I after integration by parts; the unintegrated Euler equation is partial_mu J_I^mu=0.

potential_flow_rows.scalar: partial_0 ell_I=rho_I'(n_I)u_{I0}; i k_i delta ell_I=delta[rho_I'(n_I)u_{Ii}].

boundary_terms.unintegrated: -delta J^0 delta ell' - k^2 delta J_L delta ell
boundary_terms.integrated_by_parts: delta ell [delta J^0' - k^2 delta J_L] - [delta J^0 delta ell]_{eta_i}^{eta_f}
boundary_terms.inherited_conditions: delta ell_I=0 on initial/final slices; spatial flux vanishes or perturbations have compact support; metric matter terms have no derivative boundary term; inherit the repository Einstein-Hilbert normal-derivative prescription and compact/boundary-preserving diffeomorphism condition.

certificates.covariant: Symbolic q,n,D chain-rule Hessian is invariant under simultaneous h,j,lambda exchange with k,r,mu.
certificates.direct: A separate two-dimensional Lorentzian inverse-metric/current/potential action is differentiated directly and the covariant chain-rule Hessian is subtracted, with exact simplified residual zero.
certificates.scalar: Each 5x5 baryon/radiation operator block is reconstructed from the full ADM action; algebraic entries have exchange symmetry, while the temporal current-potential pair is exchange symmetric only as a formal adjoint after integration by parts using the recorded temporal boundary condition; continuity and potential-flow rows follow from independent variations.

domain_conditions: D=sqrt(-g)>0, Lorentzian nondegenerate metric, q>0, n>0, a>0, Jbar_I^0>0, k^2>0, m_b>0, kappa_r>0; commuting smooth independent variations and boundary conditions stated above.
provenance: Exact independent SymPy derivation from the fixed Schutz-Sorkin action; conventions checked against theory/deformation_field.md, visible_sector_action_v1.py, its merged artifact, scalar_bardeen_weyl_observable_v1.py, and scalar_constraint_variational_bridge_v1.py; no coefficient copied from the constraint carrier.
